/usr/bin/c++ -I/usr/include/qt5 -std=c++14 -fno-permissive -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,-O1 -Wl,--sort-common -Wl,--as-needed -Wl,-z,relro -Wl,-z,now          -Wl,-z,pack-relative-relocs -flto=auto -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/window-stack-bridge-bin.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/window-stack-bridge-bin.dir/window-stack-bridge-bin_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/window-stack-bridge-bin.dir/main.cpp.o" -o window-stack-bridge  libwindow-stack-bridge.a ../common/libhud-common.a /usr/lib/libQt5DBus.so.5.15.18 /usr/lib/libQt5Core.so.5.15.18 -lglib-2.0 -ldee-1.0 -lgthread-2.0 -lgio-2.0 -lgobject-2.0 -lglib-2.0 -ldee-1.0 -lgthread-2.0 -lgio-2.0 -lgobject-2.0
